subject: Write Codex skill file generation section
description:
Write the skill section that generates complete Codex format skill files from the approved outline.

Following the same pattern established in the OpenCode generation section:

1. **Platform-native rendering** — Generate a complete Codex skill file that:
   - Conforms to Codex specification format
   - Uses Codex conventions and idioms
   - Includes all required fields
   - Structures content following Codex layout
   - Supports skills of any complexity

2. **Content mapping** — Map interview/outline data to Codex format:
   - Skill name → Codex name field
   - Description → Codex description field
   - Features → Appropriate Codex sections
   - Environment constraints → Codex-specific configuration
   - Tool usage → Codex tool patterns

3. **Codex-specific features** — Leverage Codex capabilities:
   - Codex execution model alignment
   - Codex-specific tool integration patterns
   - Codex environment constraints

Uses the same output path handling written in Phase 1.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Generates complete, valid Codex skill file
- [ ] Output follows Codex conventions and idioms
- [ ] All required fields included
- [ ] Supports simple and complex skill types
- [ ] Reuses output path handling from Phase 1

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Skills with tool integrations generate proper Codex tool patterns
- [ ] Very complex multi-step skills generate cleanly

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Generation failure reported with actionable details

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Generate Codex skill and validate against Codex specification
• Manual: Generate both simple and complex Codex skills
• Manual: Compare Codex output quality to OpenCode and GAS output

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Section 9.2
activeForm: Writing Codex skill file generation section

metadata.spec_phase_name: Platform Expansion - Generic Agent Skills & Codex
